name: Container Firewall
description: Configures an iptables/ipset whitelist firewall for the container with selectable service presets and optional telemetry blocking

profile.description: Preset bundle of allowed outbound services

customDomains.description: Comma-separated extra domains to allow (used only with profile=custom)

blockTelemetry.description: Block known telemetry and tracking endpoints at the network level

policy.description: whitelist drops non-matching traffic; monitor logs but does not block

enableIPv6.description: Also apply whitelist rules to IPv6 (ip6tables)
